name: Nut Goodie Center (to Be Dipped Into Chocolat
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the white coating.
2. Add the miniature marshmallows to the melted coating and stir until well combined.
3. Add the chunky peanut butter, stirring thoroughly between each addition.
4. Fold in the rice krispies, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
5. Finally, fold in the Spanish peanuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
7. Allow to cool completely before dipping into chocolate coating or forming into balls for nutty Bon Bons.
